prompt:
Goal: Create a wide four-panel lineup of cute collectible chibi AI mascot robots, each standing front-facing in its own vertical slice, like a polished 3D toy render for social media.

Canvas: Ultra-wide horizontal banner, 4:1 aspect ratio, divided into exactly 4 equal vertical panels with no visible borders, each panel using a different color theme and lighting mood.

Layout: Show exactly 4 discrete mascots, one centered in each panel, all full-body, rounded helmet-like heads, oversized glossy eyes, tiny smiling mouths, short plush proportions, winter/sci-fi clothing, soft studio lighting, high-detail toy materials, shallow depth of field, and magical sparkles.

Mascot 1: A warm beige and cream robot mascot inspired by Claude by Anthropic, wearing a knit winter beanie with a pom-pom, padded headphones, thick orange scarf, mittens, boots, and a cream coat. Include a simple orange sunburst logo on the beanie and coat, with small readable text “Claude” and “BY ANTHROPIC” on the front patch. The robot is waving with one hand. Background is soft peach beige with subtle star glints.

Mascot 2: A green and cream robot mascot inspired by ChatGPT, wearing large headphones, a hooded winter jacket, green scarf, shorts or padded pants, sneakers, and small tech badges. Place a green knot-style OpenAI-like emblem on the forehead area and jacket, and small readable text “ChatGPT” on the chest. The character raises one paw-like hand in greeting. Background is warm cream with golden bokeh, and a tiny green sprout accent appears near the helmet.

Mascot 3: A magical pastel robot mascot inspired by Grok, with a white helmet, big blue-purple glossy eyes, a rainbow star floating above the head, a small star mark on the forehead, lavender headphones, a flowing white cape with pink and violet underside, star charms, glowing bracelets, and white boots. The mascot waves cheerfully while standing inside a glowing rainbow ring. Background is dreamy pink, purple, and blue nebula gradients with many sparkles.

Mascot 4: A dark futuristic robot mascot inspired by xAI, wearing a glossy black cat-eared helmet or hood, black puffer jacket, gloves, boots, and neon blue circular accents. The face is black glass with luminous blue eyes and a tiny glowing mouth. Add subtle xAI-like markings on the jacket sleeve, and make the character wave with one hand. Background is deep navy-black space with electric blue rings, stars, and neon rim lighting.

Visual style: High-end cute 3D rendering, toy photography, kawaii collectible figurines, rounded forms, soft vinyl/plush textures mixed with glossy robot visors, cinematic lighting, crisp details, vibrant but harmonious colors, adorable expressive faces.

Constraints: Keep exactly 4 panels and exactly 4 mascots; no extra characters; each mascot should be visibly distinct by color palette and branding; use only the specified small text labels; avoid watermarks, captions, UI elements, or photorealistic humans.
